introduction: In this presentation, we will explore the volume and nature of patient complaints in 2024, focusing on physician-patient interactions. The aim is to understand the areas of improvement and to enhance the patient experience.

subsections.heading: 2024 Patient Feedback Overview
subsections.content:
• In 2024, our customer service team responded to over 14,500 patient feedback tickets
• 70% of feedback was related to platform usability and accessibility
• Feedback was collected primarily through online surveys and phone calls
• The average response time to feedback was two business days
• We implemented an improved ticketing system in Q2 of 2024 which has helped streamline our feedback process
• 80% of feedback resulted in actionable changes to our services
subsections.justification: This content provides a general overview of patient feedback in 2024, but does not specify complaints about physician bedside manner. It focuses on operational details and processes.

subsections.heading: Insights into Physician Bedside Manner
subsections.content:
• Physician bedside manner is a key component of patient satisfaction
• We provide our physicians with ongoing training in patient communication
• 75% of our physicians have received positive feedback on their bedside manner
• In 2024, we initiated a new bedside manner training program
• We believe that a positive bedside manner can improve patient outcomes
• We are committed to maintaining a high standard for physician bedside manner across all our virtual platforms
subsections.justification: This content outlines the company's views and activities around physician bedside manner but does not provide specific numbers on complaints. It discusses procedures and methodologies.

subsections.heading: Action Plan for Enhanced Patient Experience
subsections.content:
• We will continue to invest in training programs to enhance physician-patient communication
• In 2025, we plan to roll out a new patient feedback system to better capture and address concerns
• Our development team is working on platform enhancements based on patient feedback
• We are considering partnerships with external consultancies to improve our patient experience
• By Q3 of 2025, we aim to decrease our average feedback response time by 15%
• Our goal is to achieve a 90% satisfaction rate across all our virtual platforms by the end of 2025
subsections.justification: This content outlines future plans to enhance patient experience but does not provide specific numbers on complaints from 2024. It focuses on forward-looking strategies and objectives.

conclusion: From the analysis, we have identified key areas for improvement in physician bedside manners. Moving forward, we will implement targeted training to better our services and improve overall patient satisfaction.

image_queries.slide_title: Action Plan for Enhanced Patient Experience
